overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a yellow top and cowboy hat walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at dusk. The character navigates from street level under an overpass, up multiple staircases to an elevated plaza, interacting with a vending machine along the way.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the overpass, passing food stalls and neon signs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead of ego in the same direction

entered.detail: large concrete overpass covering the walkway with neon trim
small yellow kiosk with green trim and illuminated menu
blue and white garbage bags piled against the wall
multi-lane raised roadway with vehicles passing by
large illuminated billboard displaying purple and pink advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered sidewalk beneath a massive overpass in a futuristic cyberpunk city. Neon signs and digital billboards illuminate the dusk environment while sparse pedestrians share the walkway. An elevated highway runs parallel on the right with occasional traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor staircase connecting street to elevated walkway

events.description: character turns left and begins ascending concrete stairs from street level to elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs from street level to the elevated walkway, following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: companion with pink hair and white outfit following closely behind ego up the stairs

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with dark steps leading upward
red metal railings along both sides of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a concrete staircase from the street level to an elevated walkway. A companion with pink hair follows closely behind. The stairway is lit by neon underglow lights, and the city skyline becomes visible ahead as the character climbs.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with vending machines

events.description: character approaches and interacts with a purple vending machine on the right side of the walkway
character briefly collapses or falls to the ground near the vending machine before getting up

agents.ego_description: approaching and using the purple vending machine, then stumbling briefly before continuing along the walkway

notable_agents.action: pink-haired companion waiting nearby while ego uses the vending machine

entered.detail: tall purple automated vending machine with illuminated display screen
transparent glass safety barrier along the edge of the elevated walkway
tall vertical digital advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated pedestrian walkway with glass railings overlooking the city. The character stops to interact with a distinctive purple vending machine, briefly stumbles or collapses, then continues walking as the pink-haired companion follows.

events.description: character begins ascending second set of stairs toward the upper plaza level

agents.ego_description: climbing the second flight of stairs with green carpeted steps toward the upper plaza

notable_agents.action: character in blue and purple outfit descending the stairs toward ego

entered.detail: wide staircase with dark green carpeted steps and yellow edge trim
opening at the top of the stairs leading to the open plaza area

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a second staircase with green carpeted steps leading to an upper plaza. The stairway is open to the sky with metal railings, and other pedestrians pass by going in the opposite direction. The city skyline and tall digital billboards are visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air elevated plaza with city views

agents.ego_description: walking across the open upper plaza with outdoor seating and panoramic city views

entered.detail: wide open paved area at the top of the stairs with ambient lighting
white umbrellas over outdoor seating tables
distinctive skyscraper with pointed spire visible in the distance
rounded building corner with large windows and signage

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a wide open-air plaza at the top of the stairs. The area features outdoor cafe seating with umbrellas and offers panoramic views of the futuristic city skyline, including a distinctive tall spire building in the distance. The environment is illuminated by mixed natural dusk light and neon signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a sheltered street-level walkway into a wide, open-air urban plaza overlooking a futuristic skyline. It begins beneath a massive overpass where neon signs and digital billboards illuminate a covered sidewalk shared with sparse pedestrians. As the character climbs a concrete staircase lit by neon underglow, the view expands to reveal the city skyline before the path shifts onto an elevated pedestrian walkway with glass railings. The camera then follows the character past a purple vending machine and up a second set of green carpeted stairs, moving from the enclosed city corridors toward the open sky. Finally, the scene opens into a spacious plaza featuring outdoor cafe seating and panoramic views of a distant spire building under the mixed glow of dusk and neon lights.
